metadata.note: Preliminary PLCopen-style source export. Validate/import in CODESYS Development System before using with a real runtime.

sources.source:
VAR_GLOBAL RETAIN (* System and redundancy status exposed through OPC UA. REAL_IO_ENABLED is intentionally false by default. It must only be enabled after API authorization, audited confirmation and hardware validation outside this demo source set. *) GVL_System : ST_SystemRuntime := ( Heartbeat := 0, NowMs := 0, ControllerId := 'CODESYS-A', ControllerRole := 'primary', IsActive := TRUE, RedundancyHealthy := TRUE, ApplicationVersion := '0.3.0-hito3-st', ControlAuthority := 'codesys', RealIoEnabled := FALSE ); END_VAR
VAR_GLOBAL RETAIN (* OPC UA command mailbox. Frontend/API writes requests here only through the connector. Field outputs are never written directly from web/Grafana/Node-RED. *) GVL_OPCUA : ST_OpcuaRuntime; END_VAR
VAR_GLOBAL RETAIN GVL_Recipes : ARRAY[1..50] OF ST_RecipeParameters; GVL_Gateways : ARRAY[1..8] OF ST_GatewayStatus; GVL_Columns : ST_ColumnBank; END_VAR
VAR_GLOBAL (* Function block instances stay outside retained data. *) GVL_ColumnInstances : ARRAY[1..200] OF FB_Column; GVL_Simulation : ST_SimulationRuntime := ( Enabled := TRUE, Scenario := 'normal', FaultColumnId := 0, ForcePrimaryOffline := FALSE, ForceGatewayOffline := FALSE, ForceScaleOffline := FALSE, ForceRefill := FALSE, ForceTare := FALSE, ForceCriticalAlarm := FALSE ); END_VAR

VAR_GLOBAL CONSTANT TASK_FAST_PERIOD_MS : UDINT := 100; (* watchdog, heartbeat, salida segura *) TASK_NORMAL_PERIOD_MS : UDINT := 1000; (* estados, comandos, alarmas *) TASK_SLOW_PERIOD_MS : UDINT := 30000; (* estimador gravimetrico y PI lento *) TASK_COMM_PERIOD_MS : UDINT := 500; (* preparacion variables OPC UA *) END_VAR
(* Configuracion propuesta de tareas: - PRG_Simulation: solo demo/offline; nunca con RealIoEnabled=TRUE. - PRG_ColumnControl: tarea normal; usa FB_Column para 200 columnas. - En CODESYS real, los periodos deben configurarse en Task Configuration, no solamente en este archivo fuente documental. *)
